targets.agent_summary: Reviewed `src/packed/teddy/mod.rs`, which is a small module stub that only disables dead-code warnings and re-exports internal Teddy builder/searcher modules. I checked for install-time execution, network/exfiltration, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, and persistence hooks in this file and found no concrete malicious or supply-chain indicators.

I checked for install-time execution, network/exfiltration, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, and persistence behavior, and found no concrete malicious or supply-chain indicators in this file.

Reviewed `src/util/int.rs`, which is a small Rust utility module defining integer and pointer conversion traits used to centralize `as` casts and debug-time overflow checks. I found no concrete indicators of install-time execution, network/exfiltration, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, or persistence in this file.

Reviewed `src/dfa.rs`, which is a standard Rust implementation of the Aho-Corasick DFA builder and search automaton. I checked for install hooks, network or exfiltration behavior, credential or environment harvesting, dynamic code loading, obfuscation/deobfuscation, and persistence/tampering, and found no concrete malicious or supply-chain indicators in this file.
